headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Trade Desk (TTD) Expanding Retail Media Data And Leadership Bench
summary: The Trade Desk recently integrated SEVEN-ELEVEN JAPAN’s retail purchase data into its platform for advertisers in Japan, and expanded its leadership and board with the appointments of Kristi Argyilan as Chief Commercial Officer and Penry Price as director and committee chair. Together, these moves highlight how The Trade Desk is deepening its capabilities in retail data, measurement, and governance while adding senior talent with long experience in programmatic advertising and commerce...
